productName: Knots Infused Pre-roll Lava Cherries x Oranges & Onions - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Lava Cherries x Oranges & Onions supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, juicy orange flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
